title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!
